data.title: Bitfinex enhancing trading future with Bitcoin innovation. Prioritizing liquidity, precision, and independence in platform. Discover more about the exchange's decentralized approach.
data.description: Bitfinex harnesses the durability of Bitcoin to support traders with a strong platform, emphasizing liquidity, accuracy, and financial autonomy. Discover how the exchange prioritizes decentralization and independence to empower users. This exchange provides traders with reliable services and features to enhance their trading experience and success.

data.title: WD-40 Co. announces quarterly dividend of $0.94 per share, payable Oct 31, 2025, to stockholders of record on Oct 20, 2025.
data.description: In San Diego, WD-40 Company (NASDAQ:WDFC) recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.94 per share on October 9, 2025. This dividend will be payable on October 31, 2025, to stockholders of record as of October 20, 2025. WD-40 Company is a global marketing organization known for developing and selling products that address various needs in workshops, factories, and homes worldwide.

data.title: Company provides statement on recent concerns about Montgomery Transport, addressing speculation on actions taken, including litigation with majority owners. (Characters: 143)
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama on October 9, 2025, there has been a growing worry about Montgomery Transport and its related companies. Recent discussions have raised concerns about certain actions taken, such as legal disputes with the main shareholders.

data.title: WuXi Biologics (2269.HK) earns AAA ESG rating from MSCI for third year in a row.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, in Shanghai, WuXi Biologics (stock symbol: 2269.HK), a prominent worldwide Contract Research, Development, and Manufacturing Organization (CRDMO), revealed that it has been granted the prestigious AAA ESG rating by Morgan Stanley Capital International (MSCI) for the third year in a row.

data.title: Faraday Factory Japan LLC and Zenno partner to advance HTS magnets for satellites, enhancing manoeuvrability.
data.description: Collaboration between Faraday Factory Japan LLC and a space-flight systems company based in New Zealand is set to enhance the development of innovative electric equipment for satellite manoeuvrability. This joint effort, announced on October 9, 2025, aims to leverage the expertise of Faraday Factory, a top superconducting tape manufacturer, in creating advanced technology for space applications. The partnership signifies a move towards cutting-edge solutions in the aerospace industry.
